_comment: Centre-pivot (move-to-rear) demo: zoom on the lone Spearmen (seed 12345, ~500,300, facing south toward the enemy), select it, then right-click a destination directly behind it (north). Because the destination is to the rear, the regiment makes a 180 centre pivot -- it nearly halts and rotates the whole block in good order to face north, then marches off -- instead of sliding backwards at speed. Watch the block pivot around to face its destination before advancing. (Distinct from the conversio about-face on V, where each soldier turns in place.) Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
